records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you want to see me at this hour?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you want to see me at this hour?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you want to see me at this hour?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with your office so lavishly decorated. Did you plan a surprise party for me or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with your office so lavishly decorated. Did you plan a surprise party for me or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with your office so lavishly decorated. Did you plan a surprise party for me or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I'm sorry if I'm mistaken, but I'm a married woman with a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I'm sorry if I'm mistaken, but I'm a married woman with a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I'm sorry if I'm mistaken, but I'm a married woman with a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, nothing will come out from liking me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, nothing will come out from liking me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, nothing will come out from liking me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But, after everything you've done for me, I can't say no if you want my company...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But, after everything you've done for me, I can't say no if you want my company...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But, after everything you've done for me, I can't say no if you want my company...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You want to purchase my patent on refining technology in exchange for a lifetime contract and funding for research facilities?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You want to purchase my patent on refining technology in exchange for a lifetime contract and funding for research facilities?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You want to purchase my patent on refining technology in exchange for a lifetime contract and funding for research facilities?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't be serious, right? But aren't there better ways to make money if you wanted to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't be serious, right? But aren't there better ways to make money if you wanted to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't be serious, right? But aren't there better ways to make money if you wanted to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some things are more important than money? Pfft, and you thought I'd believe that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some things are more important than money? Pfft, and you thought I'd believe that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some things are more important than money? Pfft, and you thought I'd believe that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's impossible to cure the Corruption Syndrome. I know because I've seen my fair share of patients.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's impossible to cure the Corruption Syndrome. I know because I've seen my fair share of patients.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's impossible to cure the Corruption Syndrome. I know because I've seen my fair share of patients.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. I guess it's the least I can do after everything you've done for me so far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. I guess it's the least I can do after everything you've done for me so far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. I guess it's the least I can do after everything you've done for me so far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I don't know what you're up to, but I'll help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I don't know what you're up to, but I'll help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I don't know what you're up to, but I'll help.
